skill.name: faceswap
skill.description: AI Face Swap - Swap faces in videos using verging.ai API. Supports local files, YouTube, Bilibili URLs, video trimming, and real-time progress tracking.
skill.summary: CLI tool for AI-powered face swap in videos using verging.ai service with support for remote URLs and local files.
skill.author: verging.ai

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 77 patterns but all are false positives. Network URLs point to documented verging.ai API endpoints. Environment variable access is for user-provided API key authentication. Shell commands in SKILL.md are markdown documentation examples, not executable code. Temp directory usage is documented with cleanup. Skill is a legitimate CLI wrapper for a paid AI service.

low_findings.title: Temporary File Storage
low_findings.description: Skill uses /tmp/verging-faceswap/ directory for temporary video and image files during processing. Files are documented to be cleaned up after processing but temporary storage of user media could pose privacy risks if cleanup fails.

content.user_title: Swap Faces in Videos with AI
content.value_statement: Transform your videos with AI-powered face replacement using verging.ai service. Upload local files or remote URLs, trim video segments, and track processing progress in real-time.
actual_capabilities: Swap faces in video files using AI-powered verging.ai service
Process local video files and images from your system
Download and process videos from YouTube and Bilibili URLs
Trim video segments by specifying start and end times
Track processing progress with real-time status updates
Support both normal and HD quality output modes
limitations: Requires verging.ai API key with credit balance (1 credit/second normal, 3 credits/second HD)
Maximum video duration is 30 seconds per job
Requires yt-dlp-downloader-skill plugin for remote URL downloads
Video and face images are uploaded to verging.ai servers for processing

use_cases.title: Content Creator Video Editing
use_cases.description: Create entertaining face swap videos for social media by combining your face with movie scenes or music videos.
use_cases.target_user: Social media content creators and video editors

use_cases.title: Film Production Pre-visualization
use_cases.description: Quickly test how different actors would look in specific roles before final casting decisions.

use_cases.title: Personal Entertainment
use_cases.description: Create fun personalized videos by swapping faces with friends, family, or celebrities for private use.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Face Swap
prompt_templates.scenario: Swap your face into a local video file using a local photo

prompt_templates.title: YouTube Video with Time Range
prompt_templates.scenario: Download a YouTube video and swap faces in a specific 15-second segment

prompt_templates.title: HD Quality with Auto Download
prompt_templates.scenario: Process in HD quality and automatically save result to a specific folder

prompt_templates.title: Bilibili Video with Custom API Key
prompt_templates.scenario: Process a Bilibili video using a face image from URL with explicit API key

best_practices: Trim videos to the minimum needed segment before processing to reduce credit costs and upload time
Use environment variable VERGING_API_KEY instead of passing API key in command arguments for security
Verify you have sufficient credits before starting by checking your account at verging.ai
anti_patterns: Do not use copyrighted video content without permission from rights holders
Avoid using faces of people without their consent, especially for public distribution
Do not create misleading or harmful deepfake content that could deceive or harm others

faq.question: How do I get a verging.ai API key?
faq.answer: Visit verging.ai, create an account or login, click your avatar in the top right corner, select API Keys from the dropdown menu, and create a new API key.

faq.question: How many credits does a face swap job cost?
faq.answer: Normal quality costs 1 credit per second of video. HD quality costs 3 credits per second. A 10-second video costs 10 credits in normal mode or 30 credits in HD mode.

faq.question: Can I use YouTube or Bilibili videos directly?
faq.answer: Yes, but you must first install the yt-dlp-downloader-skill plugin using the command: clawhub install yt-dlp-downloader-skill. The skill will automatically download the video before processing.

faq.question: What video formats are supported?
faq.answer: Most common video formats are supported including MP4, MOV, AVI, and WebM. The skill uses ffprobe to detect video properties and ffmpeg for trimming if needed.

faq.question: Where are my processed videos stored?
faq.answer: Processed videos are stored on verging.ai R2 cloud storage and returned as a public URL. You can use the --download flag to save the result locally to your specified output directory.

faq.question: Is there a maximum video length?
faq.answer: Yes, the maximum video duration is 30 seconds per job. For longer videos, use the --start and --end parameters to process specific segments.
